title: DeliveryReceipt
description: Per-adapter delivery status record for an outbound event. Tracks the lifecycle of an event as it travels through the delivery pipeline toward a target adapter. Derived from msgspec.Struct with frozen=True.

sequence.description: Monotonically increasing sequence number within the delivery plan.

receipt_id.description: Unique identifier for this receipt record.

delivery_plan_id.description: Identifier of the delivery plan this receipt belongs to.

target_adapter.description: Name of the adapter the event is being delivered to.

target_channel.description: Target channel/conversation ID at the destination adapter.

route_id.description: Identifier of the route that triggered this delivery.

error.description: Error message if the delivery failed.

adapter_message_id.description: Native message ID assigned by the target adapter after adapter-reported handoff, when available.

next_retry_at.description: Scheduled time for the next retry attempt, if applicable.

attempt_number.description: 1-indexed attempt number for this receipt. The first delivery attempt is 1.

parent_receipt_id.description: Receipt ID of the preceding attempt in this delivery chain. None for the first attempt.

replay_run_id.description: When source='replay', the run_id of the replay execution. None for live/retry.

retry_max_attempts.description: Maximum total delivery attempts from the route retry policy, if applicable.

retry_backoff_base.description: Backoff base in seconds from the route retry policy, if applicable.

retry_max_delay.description: Maximum backoff delay in seconds from the route retry policy, if applicable.

retry_jitter.description: Whether jitter is enabled from the route retry policy, if applicable.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this receipt was created (UTC, ISO-8601).
